prs_created.title: feat: add re module bindings and tests
prs_created.description: Added Fable.Beam.Re (compile, isMatch/isMatchMP, run/runMP, replaceFirst/replaceAll, split/splitParts, 18 tests). Patch in run 24759023978.

prs_created.title: style: apply Fantomas formatting and add maps.tryFind
prs_created.description: Fixed Fantomas formatting across 14 files (src/otp/Maps,Timer,Ets,Httpc and 10 test files). Added Maps.tryFind type-safe Option wrapper + 2 tests. Fixed doc comments (list->array). Patch in run 24702949366.

prs_created.title: chore: update Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk from 16.11 to 17.14.1
prs_created.description: Bumped paket.dependencies ~> 16 to ~> 17, paket.lock regenerated. dotnet build test passes. Patch in run 24702949366.

prs_created.title: feat: add base64 and rand module bindings and tests
prs_created.description: Added Fable.Beam.Base64 (encode, decode, mime_decode via ImportAll + tryDecode, tryMimeDecode Emit wrappers, 11 tests) and Fable.Beam.Rand (uniform, uniform(n), uniform_real, bytes, normal(), normal(mean,var) via ImportAll, 8 tests). Merged as PR #74. Patch in run 24647598905.

prs_created.title: chore: add NuGet and rebar3 dependency caching to CI
prs_created.description: Push rejected (workflows permission). Patch in issue #67 for manual application.

notes: Open issues: #67 (CI caching info), #62 (monthly summary). No user-filed issues. String bindings merged as PR #71. Queue bindings merged as PR #73. Base64+rand bindings merged as PR #74.
